_comment: Wang Family Village — Memorial Shrine structure definition. Per PROJECT_MASTER.md §5.1, the memorial shrine commemorates the Teng Huayuan massacre. Small standalone jigsaw structure spawning in ergenverse:zhao_plains biome. Size 4 (smaller than ancestral hall — single-room shrine). NBT composition to be authored in-game; placeholder location references data/ergenverse/structures/wang_family_village/memorial_shrine.nbt.
